description: Using a 10-node workflow, read data.csv, drop null values, remove duplicate rows, filter rows where salary is greater than 35000, select name, department, region, salary, cast column types using an empty mapping, store into a SQLite database called d_employees.db in table employees, run a SQL query to retrieve all rows, group by department and count rows, then export to d_dept_counts.csv.

Using an 11-node workflow, read input.json, validate schema, apply a data transformation with no operations, drop null values, store into a SQLite database called d_events.db in table raw_events, run a SQL query to retrieve all rows, cast column types using an empty mapping, group by event_type and count rows, sort by count descending, then export to d_event_counts.csv.

Using a 12-node workflow, read data.csv, drop null values, remove duplicate rows, filter rows where age is greater than 20, select name, age, region, salary, cast column types using an empty mapping, store into a SQLite database called d_people.db in table contacts, run a SQL query to retrieve all rows, sort by salary descending, group by region and count rows, then export to d_region_counts.csv.

Using a 10-node workflow, read data.csv, drop null values, remove duplicate rows, filter rows where score is greater than 0.25, select name, score, label, cast column types using an empty mapping, group by label and count rows, sort by count descending, then export to d_label_counts.csv.
